desc.en: Understand how OpenEnlarge inverts film scans through real density-domain chemistry, and what every tool does.
desc.zh: 了解 OpenEnlarge 如何通过真实的密度域化学原理反转胶片扫描，以及每个工具的作用。

desc.en: Import, Develop, Tune, Roll and Export — how a roll moves through OpenEnlarge.
desc.zh: 导入、显影、微调、整卷与导出 —— 一卷胶片在 OpenEnlarge 中的流转方式。

desc.en: The orange mask, the three dye layers, and the Hurter–Driffield curve that turn light into density on film.
desc.zh: 橙色片基、三层染料，以及将光转化为胶片密度的 Hurter–Driffield 特性曲线。

desc.en: From scanned negative to finished positive, stage by stage: base removal, log density, balance, tone, look, display.
desc.zh: 从扫描负片到成品正片，逐级拆解：去除片基、对数密度、平衡、色调、风格、显示编码。
